calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CRIAG HALL'S PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Craig Hall.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:54 am. and concluding at 10:04 am.

Petitioner Craig Hall appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed May 19, 2023.

Order to show cause filed December 02, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed December 27, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name.
